name: hivelearn
description: HiveLearn — Plataforma de aprendizaje adaptativo con IA

scripts.build: bun run build:core && bun run build:ui && bun run copy:ui
scripts.build:core: bun build packages/core/src/index.ts --bundle --outfile dist/hivelearn.js --target bun && bun build packages/core/src/gateway/index.ts --bundle --outfile dist/server.js --target bun
